name: openclaw--skills--ai-podcast-pipeline
description: Create Korean AI podcast packages from QuickView trend notes. Use for dual-host script writing (Callie × Nick), Gemini multi-speaker TTS audio generation, subtitle timing/render fixes, thumbnail+MP4 packaging, and YouTube title/description output. Supports both full (15~20 min) and compressed (5~7 min) editions. Use when this capability is needed.
